title: Civil protection reservations of the State of Brandenburg (Ministerium des Innern und für Kommunales Brandenburg (MIK))
description: [Publisher: Ministerium des Innern und für Kommunales Brandenburg (MIK)] The data set contains information on the locations of the state school and technical institution for fire and civil protection (MIK) in the state of Brandenburg (locations of the civil protection reserves of the state of Brandenburg as upper civil protection authority).
